title: bEarn - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by repeated deposits and withdrawals exploiting denomination inconsistencies between BUSD and ibBUSD

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls withdraw() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx if the amounts involved differ in denomination.
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> withdraw() with differing denominations in the same tx

red_flags: Repeated deposits and withdrawals with differing denominations
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls withdraw() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx if the amounts involved differ in denomination.
summary: The bEarnFi protocol was exploited through a flash loan followed by repeated deposits and withdrawals exploiting denomination inconsistencies between BUSD and ibBUSD, resulting in $18 million being drained from the pool.
